MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: B. Paredes; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Philip Leong. is present.
Anna Liu, Attorney for the plaintiff.
Defendant Charles Scott is present.
Attorney Carolyn R. Adler appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber litigants and counsel confer in Dept 502B for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of SEP-03-2013 is vacated.
